questions.question: The `-g` option fmt initially tries to make lines goal characters wide.
questions.explanation: The `-g` option fmt initially tries to make lines goal characters wide.
questions.reason: Approved in final review after source and source_ir_id confirmation.

questions.question: The `-a` option with each single file , print columns across rather than down.
questions.explanation: The `-a` option with each single file , print columns across rather than down.
questions.reason: Approved in final review after source and source_ir_id confirmation.

questions.question: The `-p` option only lines beginning with prefix (possibly preceded by whitespace) are subject to formatting.
questions.explanation: The `-p` option only lines beginning with prefix (possibly preceded by whitespace) are subject to formatting.
questions.reason: Approved in final review after source and source_ir_id confirmation.

questions.question: The `--pages=` option encode into (or decode from with -d/--decode ) file-and-url-safe base64 form (using ‘ _ ’ and ‘ - ’ instead of ‘ + ’ and ‘ / ’).
questions.explanation: The `--pages=` option begin printing with page first_page and stop with last_page .
questions.reason: Approved in final review after source and source_ir_id confirmation.

questions.question: The `-u` option encode into (or decode from with -d/--decode ) file-and-url-safe base64 form (using ‘ _ ’ and ‘ - ’ instead of ‘ + ’ and ‘ / ’).
questions.explanation: The `-u` option reduce spacing between words to one space, and spacing between sentences to two spaces.
questions.reason: Approved in final review after source and source_ir_id confirmation.
